description: Control mobile app flows: report credits, feed ranking, quiz, and legal version.

reportCredits.title: Report credits
reportCredits.validationError: All credit fields must be positive integers.
reportCredits.invalidValuesMessage: Credits fields must be positive integers.

terms.title: Terms version
terms.validationError: Use 1-32 characters: letters, numbers, dots, underscores, or hyphens.
